productDisplayName: GAS Men White Walk Casual Shoes
description: Style Note"Everywhere is walking distance if you have the time" said Steven Wright. Prove this with gas' Walk shoe. With a sturdy outsole, a comfy insole and easy to wear slip-on styling under it's belt, this shoe is the right choice for a long evening walk. Style this with just about any casual wear ensemble and look great! Product DetailsSynthetic perforated toe box with slip on styling and elasticated gussets at the side of the tongueCanvas upper at the back foot regionMildly padded footbedPU midsole with foxing at the toe box Textured TPU footbed Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
